title: User QA Help
description: helps users help us with a QA effort.

actions.value:
Thank you for bringing this issue to our attention. To help us resolve this efficiently, we'd appreciate if you could follow these steps to verify and report the bug:

1. **Reproduce the Issue**
   - Try to recreate the bug at least twice to confirm it's consistent
   - Note the exact steps you took when the issue occurred
   - Pay attention to any error messages that appear

2. **Gather Information**
   - app version you're using you can find this by tapping "Help" at the upper left corner and then looking to the bottom of the app
   - Operating system and device type
   - Time and date when the issue occurred
   - Username of account (if applicable), NEVER SEND PASSWORD ONLY USERNAME

3. **Document with Screenshots/Recordings**
   - Take screenshots showing the issue
   - If possible, record a short screen recording demonstrating the bug
   - Highlight any error messages or unexpected behavior

4. **Report Back to Us**
   - Reply to this ticket with all the information above
   - steps to reproduce the issue
   - Attach your screenshots/recordings
   - Include any additional observations that might help us understand the problem

This information will help our development team identify and fix the issue more quickly. We appreciate your partnership in improving our product!

Thank you for your assistance.
